description: Keyword → layout-reference mapping. v2 (2026-04-19) adds `snippets`: a list of small atomic files (DOM, CSS, rules JS, AI JS, render JS) the loader injects as separately-labeled VERBATIM blocks. LLMs follow short concrete blocks more reliably than they follow a single 540-line .html file. The legacy `html` field is still honored when `snippets` is absent. To add a new genre: drop the .html/.css/.js files under this directory, list them in `snippets`, then add the entry below.
